title: Circadian Genes Clock
script_summary: An exploration of how circadian genes regulate our biological clock.

segments.voiceover: Science reveals secrets about your internal clock that social media misses.
Circadian genes control our sleep-wake cycles, influencing everything from mood to metabolism.
When disrupted, these genes can lead to serious health issues. Imagine losing sleep over it.
Studies show that our bodies thrive on routine. Light exposure at night? It confuses your genes.
Understanding circadian rhythms can boost your health, energy, and mood dramatically.
Curious about how to reset your clock? Follow for tips on optimizing your circadian health!
